name: Virtual part can be added to a Sales Order
steps:
Given a part 'Support Service' is marked as Virtual and Salable
Given a Sales Order 'SO-2026-010' exists for customer 'Acme Corp'
Given a user with sales order edit permission is logged in and on the line items tab of 'SO-2026-010'
When the user adds a line item and selects 'Support Service' as the part with quantity 1
When the user clicks 'Submit'
Then the sales order 'SO-2026-010' displays 'Support Service' as a line item with quantity 1

name: Virtual parts are not allocated from stock during sales order fulfillment
steps:
Given a part 'Support Service' is marked as Virtual and Salable
Given a Sales Order 'SO-2026-010' contains a line item for 'Support Service' with quantity 1
Given a user with sales order edit permission is logged in
When the user completes the fulfillment process for 'SO-2026-010'
Then 'Support Service' is fulfilled without requiring any stock allocation and no stock deduction is recorded
